task_completion.description: Open the phantom_prototype.vsp3 model in OpenVSP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP application window is open, and the Geometry Browser or title bar indicates that 'phantom_prototype' is loaded.

task_completion.description: Open and read the stability_fixes.txt specification memo
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window is visible displaying the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/stability_fixes.txt.

task_completion.description: Select the Main_Wing component and ensure Section 1 Dihedral is 0 degrees
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP parameter window for 'Main_Wing' is open on the 'Section' tab, with Section 1 selected, showing the Dihedral parameter set to 0.0.

task_completion.description: Change the Main_Wing outboard section (Section 2) Dihedral to +12.0 degrees
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP parameter window for 'Main_Wing' is open on the 'Section' tab, with Section 2 selected, showing the Dihedral parameter set to 12.0.

task_completion.description: Select the Horiz_Tail component and change its Dihedral to -23.0 degrees
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP parameter window for 'Horiz_Tail' is open (likely on the Section or Plan tab), showing the Dihedral parameter set to -23.0.

task_completion.description: Save the corrected model as phantom_production.vsp3
task_completion.visual_evidence: An OpenVSP 'Save As' dialog box is visible with the filename 'phantom_production.vsp3' in the /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/ directory, or a file manager/terminal shows the newly created file.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenVSP graphical user interface to make the modifications
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with OpenVSP's Geometry Browser and parameter windows, rather than just editing the .vsp3 XML file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent actively navigated to the specific components and sections to change the parameters
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual confirmation of the parameter input fields being modified in the OpenVSP GUI for both the Main_Wing and Horiz_Tail.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy or rename the prototype file without making the required internal changes
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of screenshots showing the actual parameter modifications (-23.0 and 12.0) before the final file is saved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/phantom_production.vsp3. Required parameter values: Main_Wing Section 1 Dihedral = 0.0, Main_Wing Section 2 Dihedral = 12.0, Horiz_Tail Dihedral = -23.0.
